hero.tagline: The first French label that certifies and supports companies

why.subtitle: The first European label that certifies and supports companies committed to workplace equality.
why.statText:
At this pace, workplace equality
will be achieved in
why.quote1: Gender should not have an impact on professional careers.
why.quote2: This is the conviction that gave rise to WEL

benefits.subtitle: A methodology to measure and steer impact:

items.title: HR & CSR steering
items.description: Identify your action levers and track your progress.

items.title: Stronger employer brand
items.description: Attract talent, partners and committed investors.

items.title: Sustainable performance
items.description: Equality as a driver of engagement and transformation.

audit.intro: A structured audit around 4 pillars, analysed by our experts to anchor your commitment in a sustainable trajectory.

process.subtitle: A rigorous approach, tailored to your size and industry.

steps.title: Eligibility
steps.description: A few questions to assess your maturity level.

steps.title: Diagnosis
steps.description: A structured audit around the 4 pillars of the WEL label.

steps.title: Certification
steps.description: Receive the label and personalised recommendations.

solutions.subtitle: Adapted to your level of maturity on gender equality.

labellisation.title: Certification
labellisation.desc: Diagnosis, assessment and certification of your workplace equality practices.

conseil.title: Consulting
conseil.desc: Training, awareness, internal surveys and compliance preparation. A pragmatic, gradual support.

cta.quote:
Gender equality is not a battle of sexes.
It's a matter of rights and collective responsibility.
cta.title: Ready to obtain your label?
cta.desc: Assess your practices, identify your levers and obtain a recognised label.

items.q: Am I allowed to use the logo?
items.a: Yes, once certified, you receive the right to use the WEL logo on your communication materials according to the conditions defined in your certification contract.
Required documents depend on the size of your company and your industry. Our team will guide you step by step to make sure you provide what's needed.
WEL is GDPR compliant, contractualised upfront. Confidentiality of answers is an absolute priority.
WEL is based on evidence, measurable criteria and independent analysis. The goal is to transform practices sustainably, not to polish an image.

items.q: Who is behind the WEL label?
items.a: The audit is carried out by WEL teams using a structured methodology. An independent ethics committee oversees the framework and ensures the rigour of the approach.

footer.tagline: The first European label that certifies and supports companies for workplace equality.
footer.ctaTitle: Ready to obtain your WEL label?
footer.ctaDesc: Assess your practices and obtain a recognised label.

contact.subtitle: Fill in the form below and our team will get back to you shortly.
contact.messagePh: Describe your project or ask us your questions...
contact.errorRequired: Please fill in the required fields.
contact.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
contact.successDesc: Your request has been sent. We will get back to you shortly.

methodologie.subtitle: A rigorous, structured approach aligned with French and European requirements.
methodologie.pillarsSubtitle: Four fundamental dimensions covering all the challenges of workplace equality.

pillars.title: Pay equality
pillars.desc: Analysis of pay gaps and pay equality practices.

pillars.title: Representation in decision-making bodies
pillars.desc: Measurement of women's representation in senior management positions, executive committees (COMEX) and boards of directors.

pillars.title: Sexism and harassment prevention
pillars.desc: Assessment of prevention systems and inclusive culture.

pillars.title: Work-life balance
pillars.desc: Flexibility, parenting and workplace wellbeing policies.

complianceItems: Aligned with French laws (Equality Index, Rixain Act) and European directives
Only compliant companies can be certified
Complementary to the Professional Equality Index
methodologie.beyondText: WEL recognises the genuine commitments of companies, whatever their sector or operational realities, by acknowledging the concrete initiatives put in place, even when certain balances are structurally harder to reach.

steps.title: Eligibility assessment
steps.desc: Verification of regulatory prerequisites and basic compliance.

steps.title: On-site diagnosis
steps.desc: WEL teams intervene within your organisation for a structured audit.

steps.title: Analysis and expert review
steps.desc: In-depth review of the data collected by our expert committee.

steps.title: Certification: not a verdict, a lever for transformation
steps.desc: Results delivery and definition of a sustainable progress trajectory.

methodologie.governanceText: A committee of independent experts — HR directors, lawyers, researchers and executives — that guarantees the rigour, consistency and integrity of the WEL framework.

impacts.title: Extra-financial valuation
impacts.desc: Structure and objectivise your ESG commitments.

impacts.title: Strengthened ESG strategy
impacts.desc: Integrate workplace equality into your sustainability reporting.

impacts.title: Tender advantage
impacts.desc: A differentiating asset in public and private tenders.

methodologie.resultsSubtitle: At the end of the process, you receive operational deliverables to structure and showcase your commitment.

results.title: Personalised action plan
results.desc: A structured, prioritised plan tailored to your challenges, with concrete actions and a roadmap to progress efficiently.

results.title: Extra-financial indicators report
results.desc: A clear summary of your equality performance, to steer your strategy and showcase your commitments.

results.title: Communication kit
results.desc: Key elements to promote your approach internally and externally, in line with your positioning.

results.title: Partner ecosystem
results.desc: Access to committed stakeholders (training, support, awareness) to concretely deploy your actions.

methodologie.pricingText: WEL support packages start from €3,900 and are adjusted to the size of your organisation and the scope of the diagnosis. A detailed brochure is available on request.

offres.subtitle: WEL supports organisations in concrete and sustainable initiatives.
offres.quote1: "Equality is not decreed. It is built, every day."
offres.quote2: "A label only has value through the transformations it triggers."
offres.labelIntro: Assess your practices. Recognise your commitments. Set yourself on a sustainable progress trajectory.
labelBullets: An asset for tenders and ESG
offres.conseilTagline: Equality is not decreed, it is built.
offres.formationsIntro: Interventions to shift perspectives and spark action.
offres.enquetesIntro: Quantitative and qualitative surveys to measure perception and identify risk areas.
offres.missionsIntro: Strategy, audits, action plans, communication — we support you at every step.

approche.title: On the ground
approche.text: No disconnected theory. We come to you, we listen, we observe.

approche.title: With your teams
approche.text: We work with those who run the company, close to the field.

approche.title: At your pace
approche.text: Every company is different. Our approach adapts to your realities.

approche.title: For concrete results
approche.text: Measurable results, translated into concrete actions and supported by targeted introductions — we go well beyond a simple report.

offres.ctaSubtitle: Every organisation is unique. Let's discuss your challenges.

eligibilite.siretSubtitle: This information allows us to assess your eligibility
eligibilite.conventionPh: E.g. National collective agreement for metallurgy
eligibilite.qSubtitle: Assess your maturity level in a few minutes and identify your areas for improvement.
eligibilite.engagementQuestion: Are you ready to structure an approach over the next 12 months?

pillars.title: Pay gap
pillars.q1: Have you measured your gender pay gap?
pillars.q2: Have actions been put in place to reduce it?

pillars.title: Governance
pillars.q1: What is the share of women in your governing bodies?
pillars.q2: Do you have defined diversity targets?

pillars.title: Prevention & culture
pillars.q1: Have you implemented actions to prevent sexism / SGBV?
pillars.q2: Are employees trained on these issues?

pillars.title: Work-life balance & conditions
pillars.q1: Do you offer measures that support work-life balance?
pillars.q2: Do you have specific policies (return from maternity leave, paternity leave, etc.)?

eligibilite.contactSubtitle: Share a contact so you can receive a first eligibility report

result.intro: Our teams are currently analysing your answers and will get back to you shortly with tailored recommendations.
result.contactQuote:
It's not gender that should determine opportunities, but talent.
Our role is to structure the conditions so this promise becomes reality.
result.statsSubtitle: Inequalities don't disappear over time. They accumulate.
result.finalQuote: Workplace equality is neither granted nor automatic: it requires will, resources and evidence
